title: Service Details

fields.label: Executive Summary
fields.name: executive_summary
fields.instructions: Short 1–2 line summary for cards/listings. See IMPLEMENTATION-GUIDE.md's migration table — as of the v1.1 catalogue (2026-07-13), none of the 9 approved service titles have sourced copy yet; leave blank rather than inventing summary text.

fields.label: Full Description
fields.name: full_description
fields.instructions: Longer-form content for a future single-service page. No current live content covers this depth — starts empty per each service, to be authored, not migrated. Do not pre-fill with invented copy.

fields.label: Key Benefits
fields.name: key_benefits
fields.instructions: One row per benefit phrase. ACF Pro Repeater — real Repeater field, not the free-ACF fixed-Text-field workaround the original CMS spec used, since ACF Pro is confirmed active (CMS-BOOT-001). Migration: split each service's existing short description on its separator (· or , depending on the item — see migration table) into one row per phrase.

fields.label: Related Case Studies
fields.name: related_case_studies
fields.instructions: Relates to Portfolio (cspt-portfolio) items — the CPT CMS-001 designated as the Case Studies vehicle. This CPT already exists, so this field is configurable today, unlike Industry/Technology fields (see DECISIONS.md). Will show no usable results until cspt-portfolio's demo content is replaced with real case studies — that's the Case Studies module's job, not this one.

fields.label: CTA Text
fields.name: cta_text
fields.instructions: Per-service CTA override. If left blank, templates should fall back to CMS-003's Global Settings Primary CTA text (“Book Opportunity Screening”) rather than showing nothing — see php/service-helper-functions.php.

fields.label: CTA Link
fields.name: cta_link
fields.instructions: Same fallback behaviour as CTA Text — falls back to CMS-003's Global Settings Primary CTA URL if blank.

fields.label: Display Order
fields.name: display_order
fields.instructions: Controls presentation order. Migrate using each service's current position on the live Services page (1–7, see migration table).

fields.label: Featured Service
fields.name: featured_service
fields.instructions: As of the v1.1 catalogue (2026-07-13, 9 services), the client's approved list states no primary/secondary distinction — leave FALSE (default) for all services until the client explicitly specifies one. Do not infer a split from field ordering or category alone. See DECISIONS.md's v1.1 addendum.

fields.label: SEO Summary
fields.name: seo_summary
fields.instructions: Meta-description-style summary. No SEO plugin is currently active on the site (confirmed in CMS-BOOT-002) so this field is defined for forward compatibility but has no consumer yet — leave blank until one exists rather than guessing at SEO copy.

description: CMS-005 deployment package — field model for the existing cspt-service CPT. Deliberately excludes Featured Image (native WP thumbnail support already exists on this CPT), Industry Applications and Technology Stack (target taxonomy/CPT don't exist yet — see DECISIONS.md), Core Capabilities, Deliverables, and Gallery (no verified live content justifies them yet).
